name: vr
description: The npm-style script runner for Deno

subcommands.name: export
subcommands.description: Export one or more scripts as standalone executable files

subcommands.name: upgrade
subcommands.description: Upgrade Velociraptor to the latest version or to a specific one

name: -o
--out-dir
options.description: The folder where the scripts will be exported

name: -V
--version
options.description: Show the version number for Velociraptor
